tree.name: Jalen Johnson
tree.narrative: **Jalen Johnson** is a homegrown Hawk — Atlanta's own #20 pick in the 2021 draft out of Duke. The Hawks were coming off their surprise ECF run that year, so their pick landed in the 20s. Johnson has since blossomed into a breakout All-Star candidate, making him one of the best value picks in recent Hawks history.
tree.tradeDescription: Hawks selected Johnson with their own #20 pick
tree.note: Duke forward, breakout All-Star candidate. Hawks went 41-31 and made ECF in 2020-21, their pick landed at #20.
